name: Ben the Drowned ASYLUM
description:
🌒Chapter 6: Friend or Fiend?

Ben was having so much fun, watching Jeff run around almost desperately to find you.

Were you dead or alive?

He got his response when he felt the buzz of your phone turning back on.

He was going to have an interesting time with the pretty doctor.

[ASYLUM AU]

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!
creator: Nikushxmi
